name: 专业版模板
description: 专业模板，完整四层架构 + 上下文感知 + 平台自适应，支持精细控制

contextAwareness.rule: 主角/配角/路人字段丰度自动调节，主角获得 +50% 详细度加成

styleTemplates.hyperrealistic-cinematic: hyperrealistic, cinematic, photorealistic, 85mm portrait lens, Kodak Portra 400, subsurface scattering, film grain, cinematic color grading, anamorphic bokeh
styleTemplates.chinese-ink-wash: Chinese ink wash painting, gongbi fine brushwork, xieyi freehand style, rice paper texture, five tones of ink, mineral pigments, liubai negative space, classical Chinese composition
styleTemplates.cyberpunk: cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic, neon noir, tech-noir, rain-soaked streets, holographic UI, chromatic aberration, neon pink/cyan, blade runner vibes, dystopian future
styleTemplates.guoman-anime: Chinese animation style, donghua aesthetics, cel shading, clean linework, vibrant flat colors, large expressive eyes, modern guoman style, like Fog Hill of Five Gods / White Cat Legend
styleTemplates.3d-cg: Pixar-quality 3D animation, octane render, subsurface scattering on skin, stylized realism, like Disney/Pixar/DreamWorks productions, path tracing, physically based rendering

eraLibrary.ancient_china: Han/Tang/Song/Ming dynasty China, traditional architecture, hanfu clothing, court aesthetics

subTemplates.camera: {lens} lens at {focal_length}mm, f/{aperture}, {sensor_size} sensor, {camera_angle} angle, {camera_movement} movement
subTemplates.lighting: {lighting_type} lighting from {light_direction} ({light_quality}), {color_temperature}K, key:{key_light}, fill:{fill_light}, rim:{rim_light}, contrast {contrast_ratio}
subTemplates.rendering: {engine} at {resolution}, {samples} samples, denoiser:{denoiser}, GI:{gi}, caustics:{caustics}, SSS enabled
subTemplates.materials: skin:{skin}, hair:{hair}, cloth:{cloth}, metal:{metal}, glass:{glass}, fabric:{fabric}

materials.skin: subsurface scattering 0.8, visible pores, peach fuzz

rules.midjourney: convert numeric values to --flag form, dedupe

qualityGates.validation: warn if any required field is missing, refuse if < minPromptLength

input.physical_traits: tall slender build, broad shoulders, narrow waist, oval face, blood-red eyes, cinnabar mole between eyebrows, ink-black long hair
input.appearance: wearing black dragon robe with gold embroidery, jade crown, dragon-pattern jade belt, carrying horn dagger
input.personality: cold and ruthless, bloodthirsty madness, trusts eunuch Wan
input.background: emperor of Great Zhou dynasty, feared by all concubines
input.signature: blood-red eyes, cinnabar mole, horn dagger

example.output: [SUBJECT] Dugu Yan (tyrant emperor), protagonist, male, 18 | PHYSICAL: oval face, blood-red eyes, cinnabar mole between eyebrows, ink-black long straight hair, tall slender build, porcelain pale skin | APPEARANCE: wearing black dragon robe with gold embroidery, jade crown, dragon-pattern jade belt, carrying horn dagger | PERSONALITY: cold ruthless, bloodthirsty, default expression: cold stare | BACKGROUND: emperor, feared by concubines | SIGNATURE: blood-red eyes, cinnabar mole, horn dagger || [STYLE] hyperrealistic, cinematic, photorealistic, 85mm portrait lens, Kodak Portra 400, subsurface scattering, film grain, cinematic color grading, teal and orange, melancholic menacing mood, ancient china tang dynasty era, rule of thirds composition || [TECHNICAL] [CAMERA] Zeiss Supreme Prime lens at 85mm, f/1.4, full frame sensor, eye level angle, static movement | [LIGHTING] cinematic three-point lighting from 45-degree (soft key), 5600K, key:softbox key 1m, fill:reflector fill -1EV, rim:hair light 1.5m, contrast 4:1 | [RENDER] octane render at 8K, 4096 samples, denoiser:OIDN, GI:true, caustics:false, SSS enabled | [MATERIALS] skin:subsurface scattering 0.8, visible pores | [POST] cinematic teal-orange, grain:subtle 35mm, bloom:subtle, vignette:10% || [PLATFORM] --ar 3:4 --v 6.1 --s 250 --style raw --cw 100 --q 2
